label: 2:30 PM — SPC Outlook
title: A Rare Setup Is Already in Place
narrative: It is now 2:30 PM on May 12, 2022.
The Storm Prediction Center has already highlighted this region for a significant severe weather threat.
In fact, this is the first Moderate Risk issued for this area in many years.
Forecasters are concerned that storms could organize into a widespread damaging wind event later today.
question: Where is the highest risk area located?
How close is Sioux Falls to that risk?
Based on this outlook alone, what type of severe weather would you expect later today?

callouts.text: Click anywhere inside the outlook to identify the risk category.
